score_derivation.cogency_mean: Mean Cogency_* component score divided by 25.
score_derivation.rhetoric_strategy_rate: Share of components labeled Logos, Pathos, or Ethos.
score_derivation.reasonableness_counterargument_mean: Mean Reasonableness_counterargument_* score divided by 25, only where the source dataset annotates the field.
score_derivation.reasonableness_rebuttal_mean: Mean Reasonableness_rebuttal_* score divided by 25, only where the source dataset annotates the field.
score_derivation.overall_quality_mean: Mean of the available essay-level aggregate scores above.
